# 新闻速递 2026-03-22

## Coupang
- Coupang与Naver、Musinsa等平台就商品真伪爆发争议，或影响消费者信任及加剧市场竞争。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxNcGtVdjNSRWJibTYtUTlWaEpiZ0w2a3VqTFRDMjVwQ2FmTzJBdnoxaGtNaDRHa2xnaG15TkJIUzlxWklwd1pqUmRiUnR5T2ZZQjN1STBOektwOHQyNHlmaGtlNHBYRDhpQUJpZzJmVXZ0VzhmT0Foa1NNVW5vY2VkbVJTWTJ3TEVWVjI2MmxubEVHcFJRS1g4VnZycnFTWTdaVXc?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- 市场关注MercadoLibre (MELI) 股票投资价值，或反映投资者对其增长前景的评估。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNZ0NTa1l5RWNpa0JyWTV4YTl5TjUzTlB1Yk1YbDN5bnZVc1huWUNtSXBBRmtpT25HNmk5bW4xU2QxUWhNaU9EaWdmSjRXcmc3dXJSLVI0b3FKemYxZ2JkdEUxd19lZmFXRjhxUHptMlltdGhsczJ3Z2FnaDBRNHcwNHd5VEhpS3I5ZWpTU1YtRUpTcmpSYllscHFzTXdMQQ?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- AppLovin股价周一走弱，或反映市场对其业绩或行业前景的担忧。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Allworth Financial LP增持AppLovin股票，或预示机构投资者看好其未来增长潜力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## Shopee
- Shopee新加坡平台推出宠物零食促销，或旨在提升特定品类销售额及用户活跃度。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxPTzZMWTVibGgxeFh6UHNrdmpYdmRoNUw2UGRXenNoV3R5MXJzRmxnM29XQ0dyRFo5RGRSWkNMeWZ0QVFmVkFxNGd4Rmk5anNldE45bXgxdG01Q2lWeFdLS2dpWFhDdVAwaGJrUDFnUS0zWVRVQUxrc1B6QzNHejBUUS1iMC1TcnROTFhmbW1xTQ?oc=5)）
- Shopee泰国平台销售Eero电子配件，或表明其在当地市场扩充品类以满足消费者需求。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxQYUhjWnp1MVR6VzVXOG8zQk5zeFB2QkN4a1EzN3A3YU5ZRzNET2F0alhCcmdTTWcyeHBOQXY1MlY5VkZsX1prQ2JEb1FNUHpLRUpoQmZTaGw2czJGLWg0d2dQLVh0d2kxazBEblFwYzBKMVNpLTEyTzZEel9wVkg5UG1vZEJYdw?oc=5)）
